description: openpyxl is a Python library to read/write Excel 2010 xlsx/xlsm files.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/openpyxl && python3 openpyxl.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/openpyxl && python3 openpyxl.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/openpyxl && python3 openpyxl.py --help`. Read/write Excel 2010+ .xlsx files.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the utility category. Fits when the engagement needs: Read/write Excel 2010+ .xlsx files.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Read/write Excel 2010+ .xlsx files.

name: openpyxl
